basics.name: Jichun Zhao (Elliot Chiu)
basics.label: PhD Candidate, HIT Lab NZ; DISC101 Tutor, University of Canterbury
basics.summary: PhD Candidate at HIT Lab NZ and DISC101 Tutor at the University of Canterbury, researching Human–Computer Interaction, XR Accessibility, Digital Cultural Heritage, Ageing, and Handheld Augmented Reality.

education.institution: Tsinghua University and Jiangsu Normal University

publications.name: Practical Approaches for the Protection and Inheritance of Intangible Cultural Heritage from the Perspective of Rural Revitalization: A Case Study of Xuzhou Mazhuang Sachets
publications.publisher: Journal of Xuzhou University of Technology (Social Sciences Edition)
publications.summary: Research on the protection and inheritance of intangible cultural heritage through the case study of Mazhuang Sachets under the perspective of rural revitalization.

publications.name: Research on Digital Preservation Pathways for Intangible Cultural Heritage in Xuzhou
Practical Approaches to the Inheritance and Protection of Intangible Cultural Heritage in the Context of Rural Revitalization: A Case Study of Mazhuang Sachets in Xuzhou, Jiangsu
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the 2024 Annual Conference on Intangible Cultural Heritage

publications.name: Design of Digital Museums for Intangible Cultural Heritage Based on Spatial Computing Technology
Practical Approaches for the Protection and Inheritance of Intangible Cultural Heritage from the Perspective of Rural Revitalization: A Case Study of Xuzhou Mazhuang Sachets in Xuzhou
New Perspectives on Contemporary Design Criticism

portfolio.name: XR Accessibility
portfolio.description: Research on inclusive extended reality systems, accessible interaction patterns, and evaluation methods for immersive technologies across diverse abilities and contexts.

portfolio.name: Handheld AR for Older Adults
portfolio.description: Exploring handheld augmented reality experiences for older adults, with attention to usability, accessibility, embodied interaction, and everyday value.

portfolio.name: Digital Cultural Heritage
portfolio.description: Digital approaches for documenting, interpreting, and sustaining tangible and intangible cultural heritage through interactive, immersive, and community-facing media.

portfolio.name: Rewi Alley Museum AR
portfolio.description: An augmented reality museum interpretation concept that connects visitors with Rewi Alley-related heritage through situated storytelling and mobile interaction.
